untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of Bollinger Bands constricting INSIDE Keltner Channel. This requires comparison of two band pairs (BB upper/lower vs KC upper/lower) which cannot be expressed with single 3-field conditions. Keltner Channel is not in the allowed indicators list. Chaikin Oscillator is not available (only MACD as momentum proxy). The constriction detection logic (bandwidth comparison relative to another channel) is not translatable with allowed operators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using bb_bandwidth to represent constriction and MACD as momentum proxy for Chaikin Oscillator, but core signal requirement of comparing two separate channel systems is untranslatable without Keltner Channel indicator and boolean logic for band-inside-band detection.
